other_observers: Thomas Riecke and many others; I think I found the bird in the net
specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch, Holmes Grove Bird Banding Station
description: A browish-olive backed Catharus thrush. The tail was concolor with the rest of the bird's back. The breast was grayish-white and had bold blackish spotting. the face was grayish with a little bit of an eyering.Behaviors: none as the bird was handheld during bandingCall: nonePlumage: Adult definitive
